notes.beans_dry: FAOSTAT code 176, aggregate of black gram + green gram. Use 2014-2021 only due to methodology break between 2013-2014.
notes.black_gram: Proxy: beans_dry series (black gram is ~45% of Myanmar pulse area)
notes.green_gram: Proxy: beans_dry series (green gram is ~55% of Myanmar pulse area)
notes.maize: FAOSTAT code 56, Myanmar national yield 2010-2021. Major animal feed crop.
notes.sugar_cane: FAOSTAT code 156, Myanmar national yield 2010-2021. Yield in fresh cane tonnes/ha.
notes.potatoes: FAOSTAT code 116, Myanmar national yield 2010-2021. Shan State primary producer.
notes.onions_dry: FAOSTAT code 403, Myanmar national yield 2010-2021. Meiktila/Myingyan belt.
notes.chillies_peppers_dry: FAOSTAT code 689, Myanmar national yield 2010-2021. Dry weight.
